bio.title: Biography
bio.p1: Goldcher grew up on the Atlantic coast of France, where reading the ocean came before reading a room. He found his language in the space between disco, afro house and melodic house.
bio.p2: Over 30 million streams. Already played in fifteen countries. Support from Adriatique, Keinemusik, Tiësto, Rivo and MoBlack, BBC Radio 1 with Pete Tong.
bio.p3: His sets move like a conversation, between tension and release, between the track he planned and the one the room actually needed. He is also the founder of EKLPS, a party concept built at the intersection of music, fashion and visual identity.
bio.p4: The music is cinematic. The approach is surgical. The result is a room that doesn't know how it got there, only that it doesn't want to leave.

eklps.subtitle: _ where fashion, sound, image, and movement converge
eklps.body1: EKLPS is a cultural powerhouse built on vision, influence, and artistry. Founded by Goldcher, Irina Rimes and SAN, it exists as a space where multiple disciplines can live: music, visual arts, performance, fashion, storytelling.
eklps.body2: Every EKLPS event is built around a singular concept and aesthetic — instantly recognizable, endlessly travelable. The first edition took place in Bucharest. The second in Chișinău.
eklps.body3: Beyond events, EKLPS is a clothing line of one-of-a-kind pieces created during live workshops, a digital session series filmed with ground and aerial drone cinematography, and an upcoming physical hub — part atelier, part stage, part lab.
eklps.sanBio: A background in directing, concept development and fashion design. SAN brings creative clarity and execution to EKLPS.
eklps.irinaBio: Celebrated Romanian artist with her own distinct voice and global following. Co-founder of EKLPS.
eklps.goldcherBio: House, afro house, melodic house, french touch. Supported by Adriatique, Keinemusik, Tiësto and Pete Tong. Co-founder of EKLPS.
